topIngredients.name: Lactic Acid
topIngredients.benefit: Gentle AHA exfoliant that resurfaces and brightens without irritation

topIngredients.name: Arbutin
topIngredients.benefit: Melanin-inhibitor that prevents new dark spots from forming

verdict: Sunday Riley Good Genes is a lactic acid treatment worth the premium. The multi-brightener combination of lactic acid, licorice, and arbutin addresses hyperpigmentation comprehensively. Visible radiance boost after the first use.
